programme.title: THE BIG INTERVIEW EP23: JACOB RAMSEY
programme.sub-title: From growing up on the terraces of Villa Park as a fan, to gracing its pitch as a player, Jacob Ramsey talks to The Big Interview about his life and love for Aston Villa. Coming through the youth ranks at Villa, Ramsey recalls the incredible moment he received a red card which ironically helped his career, the rise of the club under Unai Emery and how having a former boxer as a father has inspired his journey.
programme.desc: From growing up on the terraces of Villa Park as a fan, to gracing its pitch as a player, Jacob Ramsey talks to The Big Interview about his life and love for Aston Villa. Coming through the youth ranks at Villa, Ramsey recalls the incredible moment he received a red card which ironically helped his career, the rise of the club under Unai Emery and how having a former boxer as a father has inspired his journey.

programme.title: PL STORIES EP33: NICKLAS BENDTNER
programme.sub-title: PL Stories takes an intimate look at the controversial and charismatic career of Nicklas Bendtner, exploring his rise to fame and the challenges that came with it. We follow Bendtner’s journey from Premier League star to returning to his hometown in Denmark, where he reflects on his highs, lows, and the impact of his larger-than-life persona.
programme.desc: PL Stories takes an intimate look at the controversial and charismatic career of Nicklas Bendtner, exploring his rise to fame and the challenges that came with it. We follow Bendtner’s journey from Premier League star to returning to his hometown in Denmark, where he reflects on his highs, lows, and the impact of his larger-than-life persona.

programme.title: 1-TO-11 EP11: PAUL KONCHESKY
programme.sub-title: Paul Konchesky, the tenacious and hardworking left-back who graced the Premier League with clubs like West Ham, Charlton, Tottenham and Leicester City, joins Will Perry for an unmissable episode of 1-to-11. With 347 top-flight appearances under his best, Konchesky reflects on his illustrious career to select his ultimate line-up of teammates. Expect bold choices a surprising inclusion, and a formation designed to deliver one thing… goals, goals, goals. A fascinating insight into the mind of one of football’s most dependable defenders.

programme.title: PL REWIND EP06: TIM SHERWOOD: MY GREATEST SEASON
programme.sub-title: Blackburn Rovers' Premier League title win in 1994/95 was a historic achievement. Under the guidance of Kenny Dalglish, and fuelled by the prolific partnership of Alan Shearer and Chris Sutton, the small-town club dethroned Manchester United and reached the pinnacle of English football. Captain Tim Sherwood recalls the key moments.
programme.desc: Blackburn Rovers' Premier League title win in 1994/95 was a historic achievement. Under the guidance of Kenny Dalglish, and fuelled by the prolific partnership of Alan Shearer and Chris Sutton, the small-town club dethroned Manchester United and reached the pinnacle of English football. Captain Tim Sherwood recalls the key moments.

programme.title: THE BIG INTERVIEW EP20: COLE PALMER
programme.sub-title: This week’s Big Interview sees two of Chelsea’s biggest stars from different generations come together for a football masterclass. Considered one of the most technically gifted players the Premier League has ever seen, Gianfranco Zola visits the Chelsea training ground to talk to the man currently lighting up the Premier League, Cole Palmer, about various aspects of his game. From free kicks to finishing, the pair watch and talk through clips of their play and then recreate those moments on the pitch. This one is not to be missed.
programme.desc: This week’s Big Interview sees two of Chelsea’s biggest stars from different generations come together for a football masterclass. programme.title: PL STORIES EP21: MARTIN O’NEILL
programme.sub-title: Before stepping into the dugout, Martin O’Neill was part of one of football’s most iconic teams with Brian Clough’s Nottingham Forest. Hear from Martin as he shares stories from his remarkable journey across nearly five decades in the game. From European heartbreak, to promotional triumph, discover what shaped his extraordinary career, both on the field and from the sidelines.

programme.title: PL STORIES EP34: (Subbed) CESC FABREGAS
programme.sub-title: A product of Barcelona’s famed La Masia youth academy, Cesc Fabregas is rightly remembered as one of the greatest midfield players of his generation. After making his Arsenal debut at just 16 years of age the diminutive Spaniard would go on to win titles in both England and Spain as well as becoming a World Cup winner in 2010. Now taking his first steps into coaching with Como 1907, Fabregas reflects on his footballing education as well as his hopes for the future in management.
programme.desc: A product of Barcelona’s famed La Masia youth academy, Cesc Fabregas is rightly remembered as one of the greatest midfield players of his generation. After making his Arsenal debut at just 16 years of age the diminutive Spaniard would go on to win titles in both England and Spain as well as becoming a World Cup winner in 2010. Now taking his first steps into coaching with Como 1907, Fabregas reflects on his footballing education as well as his hopes for the future in management.

programme.title: PL STORIES EP34: (Subbed) CESC FABREGAS
programme.sub-title: A product of Barcelona’s famed La Masia youth academy, Cesc Fabregas is rightly remembered as one of the greatest midfield players of his generation. After making his Arsenal debut at just 16 years of age the diminutive Spaniard would go on to win titles in both England and Spain as well as becoming a World Cup winner in 2010. Now taking his first steps into coaching with Como 1907, Fabregas reflects on his footballing education as well as his hopes for the future in management.

programme.title: THE BIG INTERVIEW EP24: MICHAEL OWEN
programme.sub-title: Honest and engaging from the start, Michael Owen opens to the Big Interview, offering a fascinating insight into the career and psyche of one of the game’s most polarising characters. Owen shares all, from recounting his days as a childhood prodigy to debating what might have been had he not torn his hamstring at 19 years of age or left Liverpool for Real Madrid. Honest, raw, at times combative, Owen bares all and will have you asking…Premier League great or unfulfilled talent?

programme.title: THE BIG INTERVIEW EP20: COLE PALMER
programme.sub-title: This week’s Big Interview sees two of Chelsea’s biggest stars from different generations come together for a football masterclass. Considered one of the most technically gifted players the Premier League has ever seen, Gianfranco Zola visits the Chelsea training ground to talk to the man currently lighting up the Premier League, Cole Palmer, about various aspects of his game. From free kicks to finishing, the pair watch and talk through clips of their play and then recreate those moments on the pitch. This one is not to be missed.

programme.title: PL STORIES EP32: (Subbed) THOMAS TUCHEL
programme.sub-title: As Thomas Tuchel begins his journey as England’s new manager, PL Stories dives into his journey to the top, tracing his rise from playing career to football management. After facing financial struggles and working in a bar, Tuchel’s determination led him to become one of the Premier League's most respected managers. We showcase his unique path, blending hard work, passion, and tactical innovation to reach the pinnacle of football.

programme.title: THE BIG INTERVIEW EP19: BASSEY x IWOBI
programme.sub-title: Fulham’s Calvin Bassey and Alex Iwobi have been instrumental in the club’s resurgence. Off the field, they’ve shared similar experiences playing for Nigeria, their charity work in the community, as well as gaining an online following for their comical social media clips. In this week’s Big Interview, the pair sit down to talk in further depth about their friendship, their backstories, the importance of their Nigerian heritage and how Marco Silva has helped turn Fulham into one of the Premier League’s toughest opponents.
programme.desc: Fulham’s Calvin Bassey and Alex Iwobi have been instrumental in the club’s resurgence. programme.sub-title: Highlights of all the fixtures from Matchweek 22 includes Brentford’s game against league leaders Liverpool, as well as Southampton’s journey to the midlands to take on the in-form Nottingham Forest.
programme.desc: Highlights of all the fixtures from Matchweek 22 includes Brentford’s game against league leaders Liverpool, as well as Southampton’s journey to the midlands to take on the in-form Nottingham Forest.

programme.title: 1-TO-11 EP11: PAUL KONCHESKY
programme.sub-title: Paul Konchesky, the tenacious and hardworking left-back who graced the Premier League with clubs like West Ham, Charlton, Tottenham and Leicester City, joins Will Perry for an unmissable episode of 1-to-11. With 347 top-flight appearances under his best, Konchesky reflects on his illustrious career to select his ultimate line-up of teammates. Expect bold choices a surprising inclusion, and a formation designed to deliver one thing… goals, goals, goals. A fascinating insight into the mind of one of football’s most dependable defenders.
programme.desc: Paul Konchesky, the tenacious and hardworking left-back who graced the Premier League with clubs like West Ham, Charlton, Tottenham and Leicester City, joins Will Perry for an unmissable episode of 1-to-11. programme.title: PL STORIES EP34: (Subbed) CESC FABREGAS
programme.sub-title: A product of Barcelona’s famed La Masia youth academy, Cesc Fabregas is rightly remembered as one of the greatest midfield players of his generation. After making his Arsenal debut at just 16 years of age the diminutive Spaniard would go on to win titles in both England and Spain as well as becoming a World Cup winner in 2010. Now taking his first steps into coaching with Como 1907, Fabregas reflects on his footballing education as well as his hopes for the future in management.
programme.desc: A product of Barcelona’s famed La Masia youth academy, Cesc Fabregas is rightly remembered as one of the greatest midfield players of his generation. programme.title: THE BIG INTERVIEW EP24: MICHAEL OWEN
programme.sub-title: Honest and engaging from the start, Michael Owen opens to the Big Interview, offering a fascinating insight into the career and psyche of one of the game’s most polarising characters. Owen shares all, from recounting his days as a childhood prodigy to debating what might have been had he not torn his hamstring at 19 years of age or left Liverpool for Real Madrid. Honest, raw, at times combative, Owen bares all and will have you asking…Premier League great or unfulfilled talent?

programme.title: THE BIG INTERVIEW EP24: MICHAEL OWEN
programme.sub-title: Honest and engaging from the start, Michael Owen opens to the Big Interview, offering a fascinating insight into the career and psyche of one of the game’s most polarising characters. Owen shares all, from recounting his days as a childhood prodigy to debating what might have been had he not torn his hamstring at 19 years of age or left Liverpool for Real Madrid. Honest, raw, at times combative, Owen bares all and will have you asking…Premier League great or unfulfilled talent?
programme.desc: Honest and engaging from the start, Michael Owen opens to the Big Interview, offering a fascinating insight into the career and psyche of one of the game’s most polarising characters. Owen shares all, from recounting his days as a childhood prodigy to debating what might have been had he not torn his hamstring at 19 years of age or left Liverpool for Real Madrid. Honest, raw, at times combative, Owen bares all and will have you asking…Premier League great or unfulfilled talent?

programme.title: MATCHDAY LIVE Tottenham Hotspur v Leicester City / Aston Villa v West Ham United / Fulham v Manchester United
programme.sub-title: It’s a three-game Sunday in the Premier League, beginning with Tottenham v Leicester and Aston Villa taking on West Ham in the company of Darren Bent and Tim Sherwood, before we round out the action at Craven Cottage for Fulham v Manchester United alongside Owen Hargreaves and Dion Dublin.
programme.desc: It’s a three-game Sunday in the Premier League, beginning with Tottenham v Leicester and Aston Villa taking on West Ham in the company of Darren Bent and Tim Sherwood, before we round out the action at Craven Cottage for Fulham v Manchester United alongside Owen Hargreaves and Dion Dublin.
